name: handoff
description: Strict machine-only handoff to Codex, Grok, Claude, OpenCode, Cursor, and review-only Kiro. Every slash command uses the same fail-closed ABI with explicit policy preflight, structured results, and Git evidence.

interface.shortDescription: Strictly delegate build and review through one machine ABI
interface.longDescription: Hand off one bounded build, phase, review, or verification through a single strict machine ABI. Codex, Grok, Claude, OpenCode, and Cursor have explicit role policies and fail-closed preflight; Kiro is review/verify-only. Prompt bytes stay off argv and normalized results carry deterministic Git evidence.
defaultPrompt: Have Codex review the diff in src/auth
Let Grok build the parser in src/parse.ts
Have Claude review this module, read-only
